task_completion.description: Delete the 'L_Band_Test' module while preserving the 'Amateur' module.
task_completion.visual_evidence: In the main GPredict window, the 'Amateur' module tab should be visible, and the 'L_Band_Test' module tab should be absent or shown as deleted in the module configuration.

task_completion.description: Create the 'Launch_Site' ground station with correct coordinates.
task_completion.visual_evidence: In the 'Edit Ground Stations' window or ground station list, 'Launch_Site' is present. If details are visible, Latitude is 34.4735, Longitude is 104.2447 W (or -104.2447), and Altitude is 1229.

task_completion.description: Create the 'Recovery_Team' ground station with correct coordinates.
task_completion.visual_evidence: In the 'Edit Ground Stations' window or ground station list, 'Recovery_Team' is present. If details are visible, Latitude is 35.2220, Longitude is 101.8313 W (or -101.8313), and Altitude is 1099.

task_completion.description: Create a tracking module named 'HAB_Relays' and set its ground station to 'Launch_Site'.
task_completion.visual_evidence: A new module tab or window named 'HAB_Relays' exists. The ground station displayed in the module's header, map, or configuration settings is set to 'Launch_Site'.

task_completion.description: Add the required satellites to the 'HAB_Relays' module.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The 'HAB_Relays' module displays tracking information (list, radar, or map) for the following satellites: ISS (ZARYA), SO-50, AO-85, and AO-91.

task_completion.description: Switch the application to Imperial units.
task_completion.visual_evidence: In the GPredict Preferences (Edit -> Preferences -> General -> Number Formats) 'Imperial' is selected, OR the main UI displays units like 'mi' (miles) and 'ft' (feet) instead of 'km' and 'm'.

integrity.description: The agent used the GPredict GUI to configure the settings.
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots should show GPredict dialog boxes (like Preferences, Edit Ground Stations, and Module configuration) being interacted with, rather than terminal windows editing configuration files directly.

integrity.description: The agent interacted with the actual GPredict application.
integrity.visual_evidence: The visual interface matches the standard GPredict application layout (GTK-based satellite tracker with maps, radar, and lists), not a text editor or a mock interface.

integrity.description: The agent did not bypass the UI by running a pre-written script to generate the config files.
integrity.visual_evidence: The trajectory should show step-by-step navigation through the GPredict menus and dialogs to add ground stations and modules.

privileged_info_for_vlm: Satellites to verify by name in the UI: ISS (ZARYA) [NORAD 25544], SO-50 [NORAD 27607], AO-85 [NORAD 40967], and AO-91 [NORAD 43017]. Launch_Site coordinates: 34.4735 N, 104.2447 W (or -104.2447), Altitude: 1229m. Recovery_Team coordinates: 35.2220 N, 101.8313 W (or -101.8313), Altitude: 1099m.
